title: quercus coccifera var. palaestina
intro: Quercus coccifera var. palaestina is a rare and lesser-known variety of the holm oak tree, scientifically classified as a subspecies of the Quercus coccifera species. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus coccifera var. palaestina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of extracts or infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide potential health benefits.
